\tzpentry{ID3539}{Magnetic Flux Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3539 introduces Magnetic Flux Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \tilde\Phi(k,\theta,t)=\int \Phi(r,\theta,t)\,e^{-ikr}\,dr, \]
